lead_profile_text: STL Switch — Relocating. May relocate to another city with family (3 young children). Weighing sell vs STL vs LTL. LTL quotes received: £1,200-1,300/mo. Property needs painting and garden tidying before launch. 3-6 month decision window tied to relocation plans. Wife alignment required.
delay_trigger_phrases: 3-6 month decision window tied to relocation plans

top_objections.text: Residential mortgage risk from running STL
top_objections.zac_response: Phased approach: run initial 6 months on existing residential mortgage, then review for IO BTL switch — start STL, gather evidence, then approach lender

top_objections.text: Wife needs to align before any decision
Property needs preparation before launch (painting, garden)

top_questions.text: How does STL compare to LTL financially?
top_questions.answer: STL gross ~£35,978/yr, net ~£22,500/yr (~£1,875/mo) vs LTL £1,200-1,300/mo. STL advantage ~£675/mo

top_questions.text: What about the residential mortgage risk?
top_questions.answer: Phased approach: test STL on residential mortgage first 6 months, then switch to IO BTL to reduce mortgage costs

what_moved_them: STL net significantly above LTL (£675/mo uplift)
Phased mortgage approach reduced risk perception

conversion_gaps.gap: Wife not present at meeting — key decision-maker not engaged
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Get wife on follow-up call; send joint-readable summary
Agree timeline for painting/garden; offer launch prep checklist
Check in on relocation decision progress by summer 2026
